docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00** SERVED MAY-24-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AQUILAR, EZEQUIEL DBA IGLESIA PENTECOSTES EMANEUL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AMERIPRIDE SERVICES. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT EZEQUIEL AQUILAR, DBA IGLESIA PENTECOSTES EMANEUL. JOSE MARTIN CASTILLO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,152.84 FILED BY AMERIPRIDE SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT AQUILAR, EZEQUIEL DBA IGLESIA PENTECOSTES EMANEUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
